name: Heaven and Hell (Ganache)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan over medium heat, bring the cream to a boil and stir in the chocolate.
2. Remove from heat, cover pan, and let the chocolate melt until smooth.
3. Whisk together thoroughly, then allow to cool to room temperature.
Optional garnish:
- Raspberry sauce: Puree frozen raspberries, strain through a sieve, and sweeten to taste with sugar. Drizzle over the ganache and scatter with chocolate pieces.
4. Melt milk chocolate and white chocolate separately.
5. Spread the melted milk chocolate onto a lined cookie sheet.
6. Scatter spoonfuls of white chocolate around the dark chocolate.
7. Create swirls using a toothpick, then allow to cool completely.
8. Break into pieces once cooled.
Note: This cake can easily absorb refrigerator odors, so wrap or cover it well before storing. Leftover ganache may be stored tightly wrapped in the freezer for up to one month.
